mapper.update: UPDATE inventory SET current_quantity = #{currentQuantity}, production_date = #{productionDate}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate}, last_inbound_time = #{lastInboundTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE inventory SET current_quantity = current_quantity + #{quantity}, production_date = #{productionDate}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate}, last_inbound_time = #{lastInboundTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT i.id, i.medicine_id, m.medicine_code, m.medicine_name, m.specification, m.unit, m.is_controlled, i.batch_no, i.current_quantity, i.locked_quantity, CASE WHEN i.expiry_date >= CURDATE() THEN (i.current_quantity - i.locked_quantity) ELSE 0 END AS available_quantity, i.production_date, i.expiry_date, i.last_inbound_time, i.last_outbound_time, i.updated_at FROM inventory i INNER JOIN medicine m ON i.medicine_id = m.id
AND ( m.medicine_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.medicine_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.batch_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY i.expiry_date ASC, i.id DESC

SELECT i.medicine_id, m.medicine_name, i.batch_no, (i.current_quantity - i.locked_quantity) AS available_quantity, i.expiry_date, m.sale_price, m.is_controlled FROM inventory i INNER JOIN medicine m ON i.medicine_id = m.id WHERE i.medicine_id = #{medicineId} AND (i.current_quantity - i.locked_quantity) > 0 AND i.expiry_date >= CURDATE() ORDER BY i.expiry_date ASC, i.id ASC

SELECT i.medicine_id, m.medicine_name, i.batch_no, (i.current_quantity - i.locked_quantity) AS available_quantity, i.expiry_date, m.sale_price, m.is_controlled FROM inventory i INNER JOIN medicine m ON i.medicine_id = m.id WHERE i.medicine_id = #{medicineId} AND (i.current_quantity - i.locked_quantity) > 0 AND i.expiry_date >= CURDATE() ORDER BY i.expiry_date ASC, i.id ASC LIMIT 1
